title: Dseap Over The Door Hook Hanger - 6 Hooks Over Door Coat Rack for Hanging Clothes Hat Towel, Black
features: 1. Over the door hanger with 6 dual hooks - perfect for hanging space saving.
2. Fit doors from 3.5 to 4.5cm thick. If for door less than 4.5 cm thick, pls add the included strip foams. Measuring 39W*11.5H*8Tcm.
3. Metal door hanger hook, built in stainless steel, black color.
4. Utility over the door towel rack / coat rack for clothes, towel, hat, robes,ect. for bathroom, mudroom, closet more.
5. Easy mounted, no tools needed, including 1 x over door hook, with anti-scratching pads
description: Product Description Dseap Heavy Duty Over the Door Hook with 6 Double Hooks Dseap Over the Door Hook Rack with 6 Dual Hooks Dseap innovative over door Hook provides a convenient and space-saving solution for easy organization. And the over door hook rack has a simple and stylish style, adding an elegant accent to your home decor. Material: Stainless steel Sizes: L*W*T= 39*11.5*8cm; Installaztion Sizes: Recommended door thickness: from 3.8cm to 4.5cm Recommended gap between door top and frame no less than 0.18cm (0.07 inches) Sturdy & Durable Made of premium stainless steel to ensure its durability Hangs a Lot Double-hooks design allows you to hang a lot of stuff. Noiseless & No Scratch with full protective strips to avoid clattering noise and scratching your door Fit Standard Door fits doors up to 1-3/4" (4.5cm) thick. gap between door top and door frame: ≥ 0.07 Inches(0.18cm) Super Easy-to-Install Door Hook No screw or drilling, just plug and pay. Super convenient to use. Well-organized Adopting strong stainless steel, the well-constructed door hanger allows you to hang a lot of coats, clothes, bags, purses, hats, towel, robes, and more. Stylish & Elegant Dseap Over Door Hook Rack has a classic and stylish style that is great for living room, entry, bathrooms, bedrooms, mudrooms, kitchen and more
